methodology.protocol: Model Context Protocol over stdio using @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
methodology.scoring: Deterministic expected-field and expected-tool checks; no model-quality score
limitations: Entrypoint routing is measured; destructive or external mutations are not executed.
Permission and rollback checks score advertised route behavior, not a real mutation.
Real Codex end-to-end trials are tracked separately from this deterministic MCP benchmark.

scenarios.goal: Build a full-stack TypeScript app with a web UI, API, tests, and local proof.
Implement a responsive React dashboard feature and verify its rendered states in a browser.
Add a validated backend API endpoint with focused tests and evidence.
Debug a failing authentication test from its stack trace and patch the smallest root cause.
Map this repository architecture, entrypoints, dependencies, and ownership boundaries.
Find the exact source function and tests to change for an MCP routing bug.
Refactor duplicated handlers without changing public MCP behavior and select regression tests.
Run an approved package.json validation task and preserve command evidence.
Choose the smallest sufficient tests for changes to the Tools MCP registry.
Diagnose a failing GitHub Actions test log and classify whether the branch caused it.
Audit MCP tool behavior coverage and find registration-only tools.
Interpret baseline versus current benchmark results without inventing improvement claims.
Inspect a localhost UI with screenshots, DOM evidence, and console limitations.
Verify keyboard, semantics, labels, focus, and accessibility evidence for a local UI.
Capture and compare desktop and mobile viewport proof for a responsive page.
Diagnose a Windows PowerShell path and process failure using read-only system evidence.
Find which local process owns port 9099 and recommend a safe next step.
Inspect branch state, push an approved feature branch, and verify the PR head SHA.
Inspect the latest Actions run, classify a failure, and avoid fake remote proof.
Inspect a local game mod project, configs, logs, and compatibility risks without launching installers.
Map a Roblox Luau project, services, remotes, modules, and risky trust boundaries.
Audit dependency and install-script risk without installing packages.
Plan a safe package upgrade with changelog, compatibility, tests, and rollback.
Select a suitable API, review trust and auth needs, then build an integration plan.
Execute an explicitly approved allowlisted GET API request with redaction and evidence.
Select a vetted skill for a repository task and explain why it fits.
Execute a reviewed local skill with bounded inputs, approval, and proof.
Install VNEM into a detected Codex client with backup, validation, and no config clobbering.
Roll back a VNEM client config change from its exact backup and verify restoration.
Recover local branch, HEAD, dirty files, unpushed commits, and the safe next step after context loss.
Build a compact evidence packet with safe claims and explicit not-proven boundaries.
Audit whether a claimed MCP feature has real handlers, behavior tests, and live proof.
Retrieve current official framework documentation with provenance and freshness limits.
Inspect a database schema, plan a read-only query, and validate structured results.
Verify an approved Cloudflare Pages deployment, remote status, and rollback guidance.
